name: Kaizen
description: A culinary focused mobile app that allows the staff to undergo training and assessments to ensure they are up to date with the latest food safety standards. Key Features: Training Modules, Assessments, Progress Tracking, Incident Reporting
languages: Flutter, Firebase, RESTful API, PostreSQL,  AWS S3

name: iPan
description: iPAN is a prominent property sales platform in Australia, featuring a diverse collection of quality residences tailored to different lifestyles and price ranges. With extensive brand new, off-the-plan, and project listings nation-wide. Key Features: Scheduling, Submitting Deals, Push Notifications, Commissions Insights
languages: Flutter, Firebase, RESTful API, PostreSQL, AWS S3

name: GoldPay
description: Goldpay.sg is a secure platform designed to modernize the use of gold. By digitizing physical bullion stored in secure vaults, the app provides a stable alternative to volatile fiat currencies for both trading and peer-to-merchant payments. Key Features: Real-time gold trading, User-To-User transfer, secure vault-backed asset management, and an integrated payment gateway for gold-based transactions.

name: PGPay
description:
PGpay is a secure platform designed to modernize the use of gold. 

The 'Physical-to-Digital' bridge allows customers to trade in physical bullion at the company's retail locations for instant PGpay wallet credits. 

Key Features: Real-time trading, User-To-User transfer, and and an integrated payment gateway for gold-based transactions.
